program.title: Bachelor of Science in Agribusiness Management and Entrepreneuship
program.description: The Bachelor of Science in Agribusiness Management and Entrepreneurship (BSABME) program was born out of the need to strengthen the business side of agriculture. The basic idea was to blend knowledge of scientific agriculture with business management skills. Through the years, agribusiness as a concept and a field of study has evolved from solely the business side of agriculture to the management of the agribusiness companiesâ€™ network of supply chains. The growing importance of agribusiness to the Philippine economy has fueled the agribusiness sectorâ€™s growth and has spurred the demand for trained manpower to manage agribusiness companies. The BSABME program offers a combination of technical/agricultural courses and management/ business/ entrepreneurship courses. These are in addition to the prescribed GE courses which provide students with opportunities for lifelong learning in different aspects of life. The offering of such courses prepares BSABME students for managing agribusiness enterprises and institutions which provide agribusiness services.
